articles.title: The SEC Has Failed To Prove XRP Is a Security in Ripple Lawsuit, Says Attorney Jeremy Hogan
articles.description: One crypto legal expert says the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has not proven that XRP is a security in the regulator’s lawsuit against Ripple Labs. In a lengthy thread, attorney and XRP supporter Jeremy Hogan tells his 263,300 Twitter followers why he believes the SEC has so far failed to prove XRP is a security. […]

articles.title: Top Performing Traders Positioning Themselves Long on Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH): On-Chain Data
articles.description: The best-performing traders on decentralized exchange GMX are going long on Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) while most of the market hesitates with uncertainty. According to blockchain tracking firm Lookonchain, three of the most profitable traders on GMX are currently long on BTC and ETH. Lookonchain says one of the traders with a 70% win […]
